title: Repealed
doc_html:
Art. 4502. Repealed by Acts 2015, No. 260, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 2016.

            Amended by Acts 1975, No. 566, §1; Acts 2015, No. 260, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 2016.
